title: Missing support for IEEE 1800-2023 parameterized typedef (Section 6.20.1)
body:
## Example      

Save as `t_typedef_param.sv`:                                                                                                                                                                                 
 
```systemverilog                                                                                                                                                                                              
// IEEE 1800-2023 Section 6.20.1: parameterized typedef
// DESCRIPTION: Self-checking test for parameterized typedef                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                              
typedef logic [N-1:0] bvec_t #(int N = 8);                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                              
module t;                                                                                                                                                                                                     
    bvec_t #(4)  nibble;
    bvec_t #(16) word;                                                                                                                                                                                        
    initial begin                                                                                                                                                                                             
        nibble = 4'hA;
        word   = 16'hBEEF;                                                                                                                                                                                    
        if (nibble !== 4'hA)    $stop;                                                                                                                                                                        
        if (word   !== 16'hBEEF) $stop;                                                                                                                                                                       
        $write("*-* All Finished *-*\n");                                                                                                                                                                     
        $finish;                                                                                                                                                                                              
    end         
endmodule                                                                                                                                                                                                     
```             

## Command line                                                                                                                                                                                               
 
```                                                                                                                                                                                                           
verilator --lint-only --sv t_typedef_param.sv
```                                                                                                                                                                                                           
 
## Actual output                                                                                                                                                                                              
                
```                                                                                                                                                                                                           
%Error: t_typedef_param.sv:4:30: syntax error, unexpected '#', expecting ';'
    4 | typedef logic [N-1:0] bvec_t #(int N = 8);
      |                              ^                                                                                                                                                                        
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
```                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                
## Expected output                                                                                                                                                                                            
                
No errors. `bvec_t #(4)` should elaborate as `logic [3:0]`.                                                                                                                                                   
When run as a simulation, it should print:
```                                                                                                                                                                                                           
*-* All Finished *-*                                                                                                                                                                                          
```
                                                                                                                                                                                                              
## Verilator version

```
Verilator 5.047 devel rev v5.046-144-ga3222bee9
```

Tested against git master. Other simulators (Questa, VCS) accept this syntax per IEEE 1800-2023 Section 6.20.1.                                                                                               
 
## OS                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                
macOS 15.0.1 (Sequoia), Apple Silicon.                                                                                                                                                                        
 
## Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                
- Root cause: `src/verilog.y` `typedefDecl` grammar rules all end with `idAny variable_dimensionListE dtypeAttrListE ';'` — no rule accommodates `#(param_port_list)` after the typedef name.                 
- The parameterized struct typedef form also fails the same way.
- **Workaround**: parameterized class with nested typedef:                                                                                                                                                    
  ```systemverilog
  class bvec #(int N = 8);                                                                                                                                                                                    
      typedef logic [N-1:0] T;
  endclass                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  bvec #(4)::T nibble;
  ```                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                
## May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
Yes.
